text: In this subchapter, “department” means the Texas Department of Transportation.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 550. Collisions & Collision Reports
##### § 550.0601 — Definition

In this subchapter, “department” means the Texas Department of Transportation.

*Added by Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1407 (S.B.766), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2007.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “department” means the Texas Department of Transportation.
